welcome.title: Character Creation Welcome
welcome.prompt:
Welcome to Pathfinder 2E character creation! I'll guide you through creating your character step by step.

We'll cover:
1. Choosing your ancestry (race)
2. Selecting a background
3. Picking your class
4. Assigning ability scores
5. Selecting starting feats
6. Choosing equipment
7. Final character details

Are you ready to begin? (Reply 'yes' to continue or 'help' for more information)

rules_overview.title: System Rules Overview
rules_overview.prompt: Let me provide an overview of Pathfinder 2E character creation rules.
rules_overview.rag_query_template: Pathfinder 2E character creation overview basic rules

choose_ancestry.title: Choose Ancestry
choose_ancestry.prompt:
Now let's choose your character's ancestry. In Pathfinder 2E, your ancestry determines:
- Ability score boosts and flaws
- Ancestry feats you can select
- Physical traits and heritage
- Starting hit points (for some ancestries)

Let me show you the available ancestries:
choose_ancestry.rag_query_template: Pathfinder 2E ancestry list character creation available races

choose_background.title: Choose Background
choose_background.prompt:
Great choice! Now let's select your character's background. Your background represents what your character did before becoming an adventurer.

Backgrounds provide:
- Ability score boosts
- Skill training
- Background feat
- Starting equipment

Let me show you the available backgrounds:
choose_background.rag_query_template: Pathfinder 2E background list character creation available

choose_class.title: Choose Class
choose_class.prompt:
Now for the big decision - your character's class! This determines:
- Your role in the party
- Hit points and proficiencies
- Class features and abilities
- Spell casting (if applicable)
- Available class feats

Here are the available classes:
choose_class.rag_query_template: Pathfinder 2E class list character creation available classes

assign_abilities.title: Assign Ability Scores
assign_abilities.prompt:
Time to determine your character's ability scores! In Pathfinder 2E, you'll apply boosts from:
1. Your ancestry
2. Your background  
3. Your class
4. Four free boosts you can assign

Let me calculate your starting scores based on your choices so far, then you can assign your free boosts.

Current boosts:
- Ancestry: {ancestry_bonuses}
- Background: {background_bonuses}
- Class: {class_features}

You have 4 free boosts to assign. Each ability can only receive one boost per source.

select_feats.title: Select Starting Feats
select_feats.prompt:
Now let's choose your starting feats! At 1st level, you typically get:
- 1 Ancestry feat
- 1 Background feat (from your background)
- 1 Class feat
- 1 Skill feat (sometimes)

Let me show you the available feats for your choices:

starting_equipment.title: Starting Equipment
starting_equipment.prompt:
Let's outfit your character! You'll receive:
- Equipment from your class
- Equipment from your background
- Starting gold to purchase additional gear

Here's what your class and background provide:

finalize_character.title: Finalize Character
